sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23040" key="gunaikomani/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γῠναικο-μᾰνία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n23040.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">madness for women,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:3:167" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.167</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
